organization.name: Community Food Hub @ Malvern Family Resource Centre
organization.description: Community Food Hub, a volunteer-led organization, is on a mission to decrease food insecurity and avoidable food waste by providing low-barrier outdoor community fridges/pantries in Scarborough.
organization.address: Outside of Malvern Family Resource Centre, 90 Littles Rd, Scarborough, ON M1B 5E2

requirements.eligibility: Anyone can access the community fridge/pantry, no questions asked. Take what you need, leave what you can.
